title: BHN fail2ban Bans
description: Per-node fail2ban activity. Snapshot every 5 min by bhn-fail2ban-collector.sh.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(measured_at, '5m') AS time, node_name || '/' || jail AS metric, MAX(banned_count_in_jail) AS bans FROM fail2ban_events WHERE $__timeFilter(measured_at) GROUP BY 1, node_name, jail ORDER BY 1

SELECT MIN(measured_at) AS first_seen, node_name, jail, banned_ip FROM fail2ban_events WHERE measured_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY node_name, jail, banned_ip ORDER BY first_seen DESC LIMIT 100
